overall.description: Static shot of a gothic wizarding common room from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy style), featuring stone architecture, magical artifacts, and soft window lighting. A student character enters midway through the clip and stands by the window, adding life to the previously empty room.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic wizarding common room with study areas

agents.ego_description: stationary camera positioned in the room observing the empty common room and its architectural details

entered.detail: Large arched window with bright morning light streaming through, framed by stone
Heavy purple drapes framing the left window, partially drawn back
Large circular rug with intricate white pattern on dark background, covering the stone floor
Semi-circular leather seating arrangement surrounding the central rug
Dark blue decorative tapestry hanging on the right stone wall
Wooden desk cluttered with books, papers, and a reading lamp
Small brass cauldron sitting on a wooden table in the left foreground
Tall stone bookshelf filled with leather-bound books against the back wall
Gothic arched doorway in the back wall leading to another area

segments.scene_description: A static view of an empty gothic common room with stone walls and a large arched window on the left. Purple curtains frame the window, while a circular rug and curved sofa occupy the center. Various magical artifacts and furniture pieces decorate the space, illuminated by a mix of natural window light and candle sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic wizarding common room with study areas

events.description: student character enters from the foreground and walks toward the left side, increasing crowd density from empty to sparse

agents.ego_description: stationary camera watching the student character enter the room and stand by the left window

notable_agents.action: student in wizard robes walks from the center foreground to the left side near the window and stands still

segments.scene_description: The common room remains static as a student character enters from the foreground, walks across the circular rug, and takes a position near the left window. The character stands still by the purple curtains for the remainder of the clip, adding a human presence to the gothic interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static view of a gothic common room that transforms from a silent, empty sanctuary into a lived-in space. It begins with a wide look at the stone architecture, where natural light from a large arched window with purple curtains blends with the glow of candle sconces to illuminate a circular rug and curved sofa. As the camera holds its position, the stillness of the room is broken when a student character enters from the foreground. The scene then shifts in mood as the character walks across the rug and takes a position by the window, finally remaining still against the purple drapery to add a human presence to the magical interior.
